meaning: A letter used to begin this chapter
By The Quran! (as an oath connected to ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ after it)
in pride/might (describing the state of كَفَرُوا/those who disbelieved)
before them (referring to the previous generations mentioned in قَرْنٍ)
and there is not (with extra emphasis)
any place/time of escape (in this ayah: when there was no longer any escape)
and they were amazed (at أَن جَآءَهُم)
he came to them (referring to the disbelievers mentioned later as الْكٰفِرُونَ)
the rejecters/deniers of truth (subject of قَالَ - said)
did he make (the gods into one god)?
the deities (object of أَجَعَلَ - did he make)
and he set out/went forth (subject of the sentence)
from them (refers to الْمَلَأُ - the chiefs)
we heard (referring to what was said about هٰذَا)
the final life (afterlife) (possessed by/connected to الملة)
except (excluding what comes after from وَمَا سَمِعْنَا - what we heard)
was it sent down? (questioning the revelation of الذِّكْرُ)
rather/but rather (introduces a correction to أَءُنزِلَ 'was it sent down')
they (subject of فِى شَكٍّ - are in doubt)
but rather (introduces a statement that corrects هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ)
they taste (referring to the disbelievers in شَكٍّ)
My punishment (what is being tasted in يَذُوقُوا)
The Mighty One (attribute of Allah, connected to الْوَهَّابِ)
The Most Giving (a name/attribute of Allah)
ownership/dominion (subject of لَهُم - belongs to them)
between them both (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
she strongly denied something as false
before them (referring to the deniers mentioned in كَذَّبَتْ)
people, folk (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)
and the tribe of 'Aad (subject of كَذَّبَتْ)
and the people (subject, connected to وَثَمُودُ)
and companions (connected to وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ - Thamud and the people of Lot)
those (pointing to something far and addressing someone)
so it became true (consequence of كَذَّبَ they denied)
and not (they are waiting for يَنظُرُ)
any pause/delay (in the context of 'they will have no pause/delay')
O our lord (subject of قَالُوا/they said)
for/to us (emphasizing their request to عَجِّل)
of the reckoning (possessed by يَوْمِ - day)
and remember! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
indeed we (subject of سَخَّرْنَا - we subjected)
We completely controlled (the mountains mentioned in ٱلْجِبَالَ)
with him (connected to يُسَبِّحْنَ - they glorify)
they (feminine) glorify intensely (subject of the mountains in إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ)
in the evening (time when mountains praise with him)
and the shining (of sunrise) (connected to بِٱلْعَشِىِّ)
gathered (feminine, as a state/description of الطير)
one who constantly returns (to Allah) (describing كُلٌّ)
and we strengthened (acted on مُلْكَهُۥ - his kingdom)
and has/did (asking about أَتَىٰكَ - came to you)
the opponent (part of the story/news mentioned in نَبَؤُا۟)
the place of prayer/worship (object of تَسَوَّرُوا)
they entered (subject of فَفَزِعَ - so he became afraid)
David (as the object being entered upon in this ayah)
and so he became suddenly afraid (of them)
from them (referring to those who entered)
they said (referring to the group who entered upon داود)
with the truth (used with فَٱحْكُم - so judge)
indeed/verily (emphasizes هٰذَآ أَخِى - 'this is my brother')
this (pointing to something near) (brother of أَخِى)
he has (referring to the brother who has 99 ewes)
a female sheep/ewe (as the object being discussed)
so he said (connected to previous statement)
put her in my care (referring to the one sheep mentioned)
certainly indeed (emphasizing what ظَلَمَكَ says after)
he wronged you (referring to one of two disputants speaking to داود)
his female sheep (owned by the one with your single ewe)
some of them (as subject of يَبْغِى - transgresses)
and few/little ones (connecting to 'those who believe' إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
they/them (referring to the business partners/خُلَطَآء mentioned earlier)
and then he sought forgiveness (from رَبَّهُ - his Lord)
his master who cares for him (being asked forgiveness from)
and he fell down heavily (followed by رَاكِعًا - in prostration)
and he turned back in repentance (after فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ)
so/then we forgave (connected to previous events)
and indeed (connects to previous statement about forgiveness)
a place of return (connected to حُسْنَ - excellence)
a successor (object of جَعَلْنٰكَ - we made you)
the desire/whim (that leads away from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)
so he leads you astray (from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)
of Allah (possessed by/connected to سَبِيلِ - path)
they wander off the right path
of Allah (possessed by/connected to سَبِيلِ - path)
for them (who stray from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)
and what (connects to خَلَقْنَا - we created)
then woe (expression of warning or threat)
or (connecting two equal choices in أَمْ نَجْعَلُ)
we make/set (addressing the disbelievers' assumption in أَمْ)
like the people who cause damage/harm (object being compared to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)
like the wicked ones (being compared to الْمُتَّقِينَ - the righteous)
we sent it down (referring to كِتٰبٌ - the book)
to you (the one being addressed in أَنزَلْنٰهُ)
His signs, His verses (being reflected upon in يَدَّبَّرُوا)
and so that he may take heed
and we gave (as a gift) (connected to previous ayah)
to/for David (recipient of وَهَبْنَا - we granted)
when (referring to a past event: عُرِضَ - was displayed)
it was displayed (subject of the sentence)
upon him (referring to what was presented in إِذْ عُرِضَ)
the noble horses standing still (feminine plural, subject)
and then he said (connecting to what happened before)
I preferred (حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ - the love of good things)
away from (connects حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ to ذِكْرِ رَبِّى)
upon me (object of رُدُّوهَا - return them)
Solomon (the prophet, as the object being tested)
a body (object of أَلْقَيْنَا - we placed)
he turned back (to Allah in repentance)
for me, to me (object of وَهَبْ - grant)
to me/for me (object of وَهَبْ - grant)
after me (possessed by me in لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ)
indeed you (addressing Solomon in this ayah)
The Most Giving (a name/attribute of Allah)
and so We made (something) serve (connected to الرِّيحَ - the wind)
for him (connected to فَسَخَّرْنَا - We subjected)
every, all (describing what is being acted upon in this ayah)
a master builder (one of many given to سليمن)
those who are bound/chained (multiple males, connected to آخَرِينَ - others)
so give gifts/favors! (connected to عَطَآؤُنَا - our gift)
and indeed (connects to what follows: لَهُۥ - for him)
for him (connected to عِندَنَا - with us)
with us (possessed by له - for him)
a place of return (in the context of وَحُسْنَ - and goodness of)
this (pointing to مُغْتَسَلٌۢ - a place to wash)
and a drink (paired with مُغْتَسَلٌ - washing place)
and we gave (as a gift) (connected to previous ayah)
mercy (as a gift from مِّنَّا - from Us)
and a reminder (connected to رَحْمَةً - mercy)
for those who possess (connected to الْأَلْبٰبِ - understanding/intellect)
the minds/intellects (possessed by those who understand)
and take! (connected to فَٱضْرِب - and strike)
with your hand (object used to strike in وَخُذْ...فَٱضْرِب)
and so strike! (command in وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ sequence)
with it (connected to فَٱضْرِب - so strike)
and do not (negates تَحْنَثْ - break oath)
do not break (an oath) (negative command in وَلَا تَحْنَثْ)
one who constantly returns (in repentance) (as subject)
and remember! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to remember what follows)
and of the visions/insights (possessed by أُو۟لِى)
we purified them (referring to the chosen ones mentioned in this passage)
and indeed they (are among the chosen ones)
with us (in the phrase 'they are with us')
of the excellent ones (part of مِنَ)
and one who has/possesses (connected to إِسْمٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ)
the portion (referring to his share of responsibility)
the excellent ones (describing إِسْمٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ)
for those who protect themselves (against evil)
surely goodness (emphasizing the reward of المتقين)
a place of return (possessed by حُسْنَ)
ones who are reclining comfortably (refers to the blessed people in paradise)
they call/are calling (referring to the blessed people in Paradise)
with a fruit (that they will enjoy)
and with them (referring to the women mentioned in the next ayah قٰصِرٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ)
females who limit their gaze (subject of أَتْرَابٌ)
of the glance (describes قٰصِرٰتُ - those who lower)
this (pointing to something nearby) (subject of مَا تُوعَدُونَ - what you are promised)
you (all) are promised (what is mentioned before in هٰذَا مَا)
indeed/truly (emphasizes هٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا - 'this is our provision')
this (referring to رِزْق - provision - mentioned next)
for the ones who cross boundaries
a place of return (owned by شَرَّ)
Hell (as the object being entered in يَصْلَوْنَهَا - they will enter it)
they enter/burn in it (referring to جَهَنَّمَ)
the resting place (subject of بِئْسَ - how wretched)
so let them taste it (referring to حَمِيمٌ - boiling water)
and a dark, cold flowing substance (paired with حَمِيمٌ/boiling water)
a group (subject of مُّقْتَحِمٌ - rushing in)
one who forcefully enters (with emphasis, describes فَوْجٌ/group)
with you all (rushing in with those mentioned in هٰذَا فَوْجٌ)
with them (referring to فَوْجٌ - a group)
indeed they (referring to the group mentioned as فَوْجٌ/crowd in the previous ayah)
they burned/roasted (referring to the group mentioned in هٰذَا فَوْجٌ)
of the fire (object of مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ)
rather/but rather (contrasts with قَالُوا - they said)
and how bad! and what an evil thing! (criticizing ٱلْقَرَارُ/the settlement)
the place to settle/stay (subject of بِئْسَ - how evil)
Our Lord! (being called upon by those speaking in قَالُوا)
who (asking about the one who قَدَّمَ/brought forth)
punishment (object of فَزِدْهُ - so increase it)
we were (subject of نَعُدُّهُم/we used to count them)
in mockery (describes how أَتَّخَذْنٰهُمْ/we took them)
or (connecting to أَتَّخَذْنٰهُمْ - did we take them)
away from them (referring to those who were mocked in أَتَّخَذْنٰهُمْ)
only/just (introducing what the Prophet ﷺ says about himself)
I (in the context of 'I am only a warner')
from/of (connecting إِلٰهٍ to what comes before)
The Supreme Overpowerer (one of Allah's names)
and the earth (connected to ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - the heavens)
and what (connects رَبُّ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ with what's between them)
The Mighty One (a name of Allah)
The Oft-Forgiving One (attribute of اللَّهِ, subject of this phrase)
it (referring to what is being told/said in قُلْ)
you all (who are turning away from عَنْهُ)
away from him/about him (object of مُعْرِضُونَ - turning away)
those who turn away (subject of أَنتُمْ)
what (asking about something in this ayah)
he was (negated by مَا before it)
any knowledge (of بِٱلْمَلَإِ - about the highest assembly)
the Highest, the Most Elevated (referring to the exalted assembly of angels)
that indeed (introducing what is revealed to the Prophet ﷺ)
a warner (describes Prophet Muhammad ﷺ as one who warns people about Allah's punishment)
to the angels (who Allah is addressing)
indeed I (speaking to الْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ - the angels)
from/of (shows what بَشَرًا is made of, with emphasis)
clay/mud (being used to create from) (material for بَشَرًا)
and/so when (followed by سَوَّيْتُهُ - I have fashioned him)
I shaped him perfectly (with special care)
and I blew/breathed (connects to سَوَّيْتُهُۥ - 'I fashioned him')
to him (referring to Adam, who is being created)
so he bowed down with his forehead touching the ground (followed by الْمَلٰٓئِكَةُ - the angels)
the angels (as the ones who prostrated in فَسَجَدَ)
except (excluding إِبْلِيسَ from those who prostrated)
Iblis (as the object being excepted by إِلَّآ)
O Iblis! (being addressed by قَالَ - He said)
that you bow down in worship (to مَا)
with/by my two hands (object of خَلَقْتُ)
or (connecting to أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ - were you arrogant)
you were (addressing Iblis in response to his refusal to prostrate)
he said (introducing what Iblis/Satan says next)
from him (connected to خَيْرٌ - better than)
you created me (said by Iblis to Allah)
from (showing what نَّارٍ/fire is made of)
from (showing what something is made of)
so exit! (command to one male) (after قَالَ)
an outcast/one who is driven away
and indeed (connects to لَعْنَتِىٓ - my curse)
to/towards (connects يَوْمِ to what comes before)
of the judgment (possessed by يَوْمِ - Day)
so indeed you (being addressed by اللَّهِ)
the ones who are given time (مِنَ shows they are part of a group)
he said (followed by فَبِعِزَّتِكَ - 'so by Your might')
then by your might (responding to قَالَ - he said)
I will most definitely lead them astray
all together (as objects of لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will mislead them)
from them (referring to عِبَادَكَ - Your servants)
the purified/chosen ones (describing عِبَادَكَ - Your servants)
so the truth (response to قَالَ - he said)
and the truth (object of أَقُولُ - I say)
Hell (object of لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)
he followed you (referring to the one being addressed in this statement)
from them (referring to those who follow شيطان)
I ask you all (object of قُلْ - say)
upon him (referring to أَجْرٍ 'reward' in this ayah)
the ones who burden themselves unnecessarily (after مِنَ)
he/it (referring to the Quran in this ayah)
except/but (excluding this Quran from being anything other than a reminder)
and you will surely know (with absolute certainty)
